---
title: "Party or Climate? The Polarization of the US Public’s Energy Preferences"
bibliography: /Users/matthewnowlin/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox/refs.bib
csl: /Users/matthewnowlin/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UTArlington/01-RESEARCH/Manuscript-Files/csl/american-political-science-association.csl
fig-cap-location: top
fontfamily: ebgaramond
link-bibliography: false
format: 
  pdf:
    include-in-header: 
      text: |
        \usepackage{setspace}
        \usepackage{dcolumn}
        \usepackage{float}
        \usepackage{amsmath}
        \addtokomafont{disposition}{\rmfamily}
  docx:
    reference-doc: /Users/matthewnowlin/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UTArlington/01-RESEARCH/Manuscript-Files/reference.docx
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE, message=FALSE}
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath(".."))
```

```{r load data and recodes}
#| echo: false
#| include: false
#| warning: false

cueEnergyData <- read.csv("data/cueEnergyData.csv")

```


# Results 

```{r ols models}
#| message: false
#| include: false

names(cueEnergyData)
table(cueEnergyData$trump.approval)

# cue models 
summary(cuemodel1 <- lm(renewables.opinion ~ conRep + libDem+trump.approval+male+white+edu+inc, data = cueEnergyData, subset = (trump.cue == 1)))
summary(cuemodel2 <- lm(renewables.opinion ~ conRep + libDem+trump.approval+male+white+edu+inc, data = cueEnergyData, subset = (climate.cue == 1)))


# models: data subset by condition  
summary(ffmodelTrump <- lm(alloc.fossil ~ conRep + libDem+trump.approval+male+white+edu+inc, data = cueEnergyData, subset = (trump.cue == 1)))
summary(ffmodelClimate <- lm(alloc.fossil ~ conRep + libDem+trump.approval+male+white+edu+inc, data = cueEnergyData, subset = (climate.cue == 1)))
summary(ffmodelControl <- lm(alloc.fossil ~ conRep + libDem+trump.approval+male+white+edu+inc, data = cueEnergyData, subset = (control == 1)))

summary(WindmodelTrump <- lm(alloc.wind ~ conRep + libDem+trump.approval+male+white+edu+inc, data = cueEnergyData, subset = (trump.cue == 1)))
summary(WindmodelClimate <- lm(alloc.wind ~ conRep + libDem+trump.approval+male+white+edu+inc, data = cueEnergyData, subset = (climate.cue == 1)))
summary(WindmodelControl <- lm(alloc.wind ~ conRep + libDem+trump.approval+male+white+edu+inc, data = cueEnergyData, subset = (control == 1)))

summary(SolarmodelTrump <- lm(alloc.solar ~ conRep + libDem+trump.approval+male+white+edu+inc, data = cueEnergyData, subset = (trump.cue == 1)))
summary(SolarmodelClimate <- lm(alloc.solar ~ conRep + libDem+trump.approval+male+white+edu+inc, data = cueEnergyData, subset = (climate.cue == 1)))
summary(SolarmodelControl <- lm(alloc.solar ~ conRep + libDem+trump.approval+male+white+edu+inc, data = cueEnergyData, subset = (control == 1)))

summary(HydromodelTrump <- lm(alloc.hydro ~ conRep + libDem+trump.approval+male+white+edu+inc, data = cueEnergyData, subset = (trump.cue == 1)))
summary(HydromodelClimate <- lm(alloc.hydro ~ conRep + libDem+trump.approval+male+white+edu+inc, data = cueEnergyData, subset = (climate.cue == 1)))
summary(HydromodelControl <- lm(alloc.hydro ~ conRep + libDem+trump.approval+male+white+edu+inc, data = cueEnergyData, subset = (control == 1)))

summary(NuclearmodelTrump <- lm(alloc.nuclear ~ conRep + libDem+trump.approval+male+white+edu+inc, data = cueEnergyData, subset = (trump.cue == 1)))
summary(NuclearmodelClimate <- lm(alloc.nuclear ~ conRep + libDem+trump.approval+male+white+edu+inc, data = cueEnergyData, subset = (climate.cue == 1)))
summary(NuclearmodelControl <- lm(alloc.nuclear ~ conRep + libDem+trump.approval+male+white+edu+inc, data = cueEnergyData, subset = (control == 1)))

# predictions
con_data <- data.frame(conRep = 1, libDem = 0, 
                       trump.approval=mean(cueEnergyData$trump.approval),
                       male=mean(cueEnergyData$male),
                       white=mean(cueEnergyData$white),
                       edu=mean(cueEnergyData$edu),
                       inc=mean(cueEnergyData$inc))
lib_data <- data.frame(libDem = 1, conRep = 0, 
                       trump.approval=mean(cueEnergyData$trump.approval),
                       male=mean(cueEnergyData$male),
                       white=mean(cueEnergyData$white),
                       edu=mean(cueEnergyData$edu),
                       inc=mean(cueEnergyData$inc))

predictFFtrumpCon <- predict(ffmodelTrump, newdata = con_data, interval = "confidence")
predictFFtrumpLib <- predict(ffmodelTrump, newdata = lib_data, interval = "confidence")

predictFFclimateCon <- predict(ffmodelClimate, newdata = con_data, interval = "confidence")
predictFFclimateLib <- predict(ffmodelClimate, newdata = lib_data, interval = "confidence")

predictFFcontrolCon <- predict(ffmodelControl, newdata = con_data, interval = "confidence")
predictFFcontrolLib <- predict(ffmodelControl, newdata = lib_data, interval = "confidence")

predictWindtrumpCon <- predict(WindmodelTrump, newdata = con_data, interval = "confidence")
predictWindtrumpLib <- predict(WindmodelTrump, newdata = lib_data, interval = "confidence")

predictWindclimateCon <- predict(WindmodelClimate, newdata = con_data, interval = "confidence")
predictWindclimateLib <- predict(WindmodelClimate, newdata = lib_data, interval = "confidence")

predictWindcontrolCon <- predict(WindmodelControl, newdata = con_data, interval = "confidence")
predictWindcontrolLib <- predict(WindmodelControl, newdata = lib_data, interval = "confidence")

predictSolartrumpCon <- predict(SolarmodelTrump, newdata = con_data, interval = "confidence")
predictSolartrumpLib <- predict(SolarmodelTrump, newdata = lib_data, interval = "confidence")

predictSolarclimateCon <- predict(SolarmodelClimate, newdata = con_data, interval = "confidence")
predictSolarclimateLib <- predict(SolarmodelClimate, newdata = lib_data, interval = "confidence")

predictSolarcontrolCon <- predict(SolarmodelControl, newdata = con_data, interval = "confidence")
predictSolarcontrolLib <- predict(SolarmodelControl, newdata = lib_data, interval = "confidence")

predictHydrotrumpCon <- predict(HydromodelTrump, newdata = con_data, interval = "confidence")
predictHydrotrumpLib <- predict(HydromodelTrump, newdata = lib_data, interval = "confidence")

predictHydroclimateCon <- predict(HydromodelClimate, newdata = con_data, interval = "confidence")
predictHydroclimateLib <- predict(HydromodelClimate, newdata = lib_data, interval = "confidence")

predictHydrocontrolCon <- predict(HydromodelControl, newdata = con_data, interval = "confidence")
predictHydrocontrolLib <- predict(HydromodelControl, newdata = lib_data, interval = "confidence")

predictNucleartrumpCon <- predict(NuclearmodelTrump, newdata = con_data, interval = "confidence")
predictNucleartrumpLib <- predict(NuclearmodelTrump, newdata = lib_data, interval = "confidence")

predictNuclearclimateCon <- predict(NuclearmodelClimate, newdata = con_data, interval = "confidence")
predictNuclearclimateLib <- predict(NuclearmodelClimate, newdata = lib_data, interval = "confidence")

predictNuclearcontrolCon <- predict(NuclearmodelControl, newdata = con_data, interval = "confidence")
predictNuclearcontrolLib <- predict(NuclearmodelControl, newdata = lib_data, interval = "confidence")

fossilFitTrump <- c(predictFFtrumpCon[, "fit"], predictFFtrumpLib[, "fit"])
fossilFitClimate <- c(predictFFclimateCon[, "fit"], predictFFclimateLib[, "fit"])
fossilFitControl <- c(predictFFcontrolCon[, "fit"], predictFFcontrolLib[, "fit"])

predictFFtrumpCon[, "fit"] + predictWindtrumpCon[, "fit"] + predictSolartrumpCon[, "fit"] + predictHydrotrumpCon[, "fit"] + predictNucleartrumpCon[, "fit"]

```


\newpage

# Online Methods 
\setcounter{table}{0}
\renewcommand{\thetable}{A\arabic{table}}

\newpage

# References
\setlength{\parindent}{-0.2in}
\setlength{\leftskip}{0.2in}
\setlength{\parskip}{8pt}
\vspace*{-0.2in}
\singlespace
\noindent
